description: ThreatJammer was a threat-intelligence and data-enrichment service for querying security-related data and heuristics. The currently live `threatjammer.com` website no longer appears to host the original developer documentation, but an archived OpenAPI description of the User API remains available via APIs.guru.
summary: ThreatJammer exposes one documented REST API surface: the ThreatJammer User API at `https://dublin.api.threatjammer.com`, authenticated with a region-specific bearer token.
